headline: Anker's noise-blocking earbuds for sleeping are nearly half off
summary: Anker's Soundcore Sleep A20 earbuds are designed to muffle distracting sounds for better sleep. They are currently available for a new all-time low price of $99.99. This deal offers an $80 discount at Best Buy and Target.

headline: iRobot's newest floor cleaner isn't a robot
summary: iRobot launched its first non-robotic floor cleaner, the $399 Roomba Electro Plus. This 5-in-1 device combines vacuuming, mopping, and disinfecting. The company also updated its robot vacuum line with five new models.

headline: Microsoft fixes storage-hogging Windows 11 folder
summary: Microsoft addressed a Windows 11 bug causing a folder to consume several gigabytes of storage. The fix is included in the optional June 2026 update (KB5095093). This update improves disk space usage for the CapabilityAccessManager.db-wal file.

headline: Solos debuts an even lighter version of its camera-less smart glasses
summary: Solos introduced a new, lighter version of its AirGo smart glasses, the AirGo A6. The new model weighs only 19 grams, ditching cameras for a sleeker design. It features an AI assistant relying solely on voice interactions for enhanced privacy.

headline: PlayStation's first tweet since disc-killing announcement draws expected reaction
summary: PlayStation posted its first tweet since revealing plans to end physical discs on consoles. The public reaction to the tweet is largely negative. This reflects ongoing community concern over the shift away from disc-based games.

headline: Xbox announces Game Pass lineup after layoffs and strategy admission
summary: Microsoft revealed the July Game Pass lineup following recent Xbox business layoffs. This announcement comes after CEO Asha Sharma admitted the gaming strategy had not worked out. The company faces scrutiny amidst these significant internal changes.

headline: Aion 2: An MMO with wings, cute pets, and fast-paced combat
summary: IGN previewed Aion 2, an upcoming MMO featuring player wings and unique pets. The game offers fast-paced four-player party content and challenging eight-player raids. Combat focuses on intense boss fights rather than traditional scenario navigation.

headline: Criterion's future is Battlefield, but its Burnout legacy endures
summary: Burnout creator Criterion has been rebranded as "A Battlefield Studio." Despite the rebrand, its 30-year legacy of making phenomenal racing games should be remembered. This shift marks a new focus while acknowledging its rich heritage.

headline: Monaco bomb attack suspect found dead in Ukraine
summary: Anastasiia Berezovska, suspected in a Monaco bomb attack, has been found dead. Police had been searching for her after a Ukrainian millionaire was injured in the blast. The incident highlights the international reach of the investigation.

headline: One million UK homeowners face higher mortgages
summary: An additional one million UK homeowners are expected to face higher mortgage payments. They will pay an average of £45 more per month upon moving to new deals. This change is projected to impact households over the next two years.

headline: Belgium taunts US, citing Trump move as motivation
summary: Belgium's Nicolas Raskin stated that FIFA's decision to allow US striker Folarin Balogun to play against them motivated their team. The Belgian side taunted the US, rallying behind the "overturn this" sentiment. This fueled their performance in the last-16 tie in Seattle.

headline: Stars dazzle at 'The Odyssey' world premiere in London
summary: Anne Hathaway, Zendaya, Tom Holland, and Matt Damon attended the London premiere of Christopher Nolan's 'The Odyssey.' Stars walked the red carpet for the adaptation of Homer's Ancient Greek epic. The event drew significant attention with its celebrity turnout.
